input.drop_prompt: Drag and drop a log file here, or click to browse
input.text_placeholder: Paste log lines here — one entry per line
input.mode_combined_desc: Explanation + Recommendation in one call. Faster.
input.mode_separate_desc: Separate calls for each. Slower but shows modular architecture.

actions.title: Suggested Analyst Actions
actions.disclaimer: Suggested actions only. No real system changes will be made.

progress.title: Analyzing Logs
progress.partial_note: Analysis was stopped early. Results below are from processed logs only.
progress.cancelled_note: Analysis cancelled at {{processed}} / {{total}} logs. Results are saved.

limitations.title: Known Limitations
limitations.text: This system is trained primarily on Cowrie SSH honeypot and HDFS logs. Results for other log types such as web, firewall, authentication, and endpoint logs may have higher false positive rates. HDFS suspicious/anomaly detection requires block-level or session-level context and cannot be reliably determined from a single log line.

errors.EMPTY_FILE: The uploaded file contains no log lines.
errors.EMPTY_TEXT: The submitted text contains no log lines.
errors.MODEL_NOT_LOADED: The analysis model is not loaded. Please start the backend.
errors.ANALYSIS_RUNTIME_ERROR: Analysis failed. Please check the backend logs.
errors.FILE_READ_ERROR: Could not read the uploaded file.
errors.GPU_MEMORY_ERROR: GPU memory error. Try a smaller batch.
errors.INVALID_ANALYSIS_MODE: Invalid analysis mode. Use combined or separate.
errors.CSV_WRITE_ERROR: Could not write the CSV export file.
errors.DATABASE_ERROR: Database error. Please restart the backend.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Cannot reach the backend. Ensure it is running on port 8000.
